texto: We arrived and the miracle happened.It was the sea and the wind in the bells.We came from far, from years Thirsty as dust, from humble fishermen’s nets on barren shore."~ José Manuel Cardona, from Poems to Circe, The Birnam Wood (El Bosque de Birnam, Consell Insular D'Eivissa, 2007).Translated from the Spanish by Helene Cardona.
explicacao: Citação de José Manuel Cardona sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. “We arrived and the miracle happened.It was the sea and the wind in the bells.We came from far, fr…” articula sucesso, poetry, poetry-quotes em registro de sucesso, com relevância para contextos como poetry-quotes.
